English: I will sing a new song to you, God. On a ten-stringed lyre, I will sing praises to you.

Kikuyu: nyinĩre Ũrĩa ũhootanagĩra athamaki, o we ũhonokagia Daudi ndungata yake harĩ rũhiũ rwa njora rwa ũragani.
English: You are he who gives salvation to kings, who rescues David, his servant, from the deadly sword.

Kikuyu: Ndeithũra na ũũthare, ũndute kuuma moko-inĩ ma andũ a kũngĩ, arĩa tũnua twao twaragia maheeni, o acio moko mao ma ũrĩo marĩ ma wara.
English: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hands of foreigners, whose mouths speak deceit, whose right hand is a right hand of falsehood.

Kikuyu: Hĩndĩ ĩyo aanake aitũ magaatuĩka ta mĩmera mĩrore wega wĩthĩ-inĩ wao, nao airĩtu aitũ mahaane ta itugĩ ciacũhĩtio cia kũgemia nyũmba ya ũthamaki.
English: Then our sons will be like well-nurtured plants, our daughters like pillars carved to adorn a palace.

Kikuyu: Makũmbĩ maitũ makaiyũragio irio cia mĩthemba yothe. Ngʼondu ciitũ ikaingĩha ikinye ngiri nyingĩ, cingĩhe ikinye makũmi ma ngiri kũu mĩgũnda-inĩ iitũ;
English: Our barns are full, filled with all kinds of provision. Our sheep produce thousands and ten thousands in our fields.

Kikuyu: nacio ndegwa ciitũ nĩigakuuaga mĩrigo mĩritũ. Thingo itigakorwo na mĩanya, kana gũtahwo tũtwarwo ũkombo-inĩ, o na gũtigakorwo na kĩrĩro kĩa mĩnyamaro njĩra-inĩ cia matũũra.
English: Our oxen will pull heavy loads. There is no breaking in, and no going away, and no outcry in our streets.

Kikuyu: Kũrathimwo nĩ andũ arĩa matariĩ ta ũguo; kũrathimwo nĩ andũ arĩa Ngai wao arĩ we Jehova.
English: Happy are the people who are in such a situation. Happy are the people whose God is Yahweh.

Kikuyu: Nĩngũgũtũũgĩria, Wee Ngai wakwa Mũthamaki; ndĩrĩĩgoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku tene na tene.
English: I will exalt you, my God, the King. I will praise your name forever and ever.

Kikuyu: O mũthenya ndĩrĩkũgoocaga na ngumagie rĩĩtwa rĩaku tene na tene.
English: Every day I will praise you. I will extol your name forever and ever.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe mũnene, na nowe wagĩrĩire kũgoocwo mũno; ũnene wake gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũũtuĩria.
English: Great is Yahweh, and greatly to be praised! His greatness is unsearchable.

Kikuyu: Rũciaro rũmwe nĩrũkarahĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ maũndũ marĩa waneka; nĩrũkamenyithanagia ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia hinya.
English: One generation will commend your works to another, and will declare your mighty acts.

Kikuyu: Nĩmakaaria ũhoro wa ũkaru wa ũnene waku ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri, na niĩ ndaranagie ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia magegania.
English: I will meditate on the glorious majesty of your honor, on your wondrous works.

Kikuyu: Nĩmarĩheanaga ũhoro wa ũhoti wa maũndũ maku ma kũmakania, na niĩ hunjagie ũhoro wa ũnene wa ciĩko ciaku.
English: Men will speak of the might of your awesome acts. I will declare your greatness.

Kikuyu: Nĩmagakũngũĩra wega waku mũingĩ, na maine ũhoro wa ũthingu waku makenete.
English: They will utter the memory of your great goodness, and will sing of your righteousness.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mũtugi na nĩ mũigua-tha, ndahiũhaga kũrakara, na aiyũrĩtwo nĩ wendo.
English: Yahweh is gracious, merciful, slow to anger, and of great loving kindness.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mwega harĩ andũ othe; nĩaiguagĩra tha kĩrĩa gĩothe ombĩte.
English: Yahweh is good to all. His tender mercies are over all his works.

Kikuyu: Wee Jehova, kĩrĩa gĩothe ũmbĩte nĩkĩrĩkũgoocaga; andũ aku arĩa aamũre nĩmarĩgũkumagia.
English: All your works will give thanks to you, Yahweh. Your saints will extol you.

Kikuyu: Nĩmarĩheanaga ũhoro wa riiri wa ũthamaki waku, na maaragie ũhoro wa hinya waku,
English: They will speak of the glory of your kingdom, and talk about your power,

Kikuyu: nĩgeetha andũ othe mamenye ũhoro wa ciĩko ciaku cia hinya, o na ũkaru wa ũthamaki waku, ũrĩa ũrĩ riiri.
English: to make known to the sons of men his mighty acts, the glory of the majesty of his kingdom.

Kikuyu: Ũthamaki waku nĩ ũthamaki wa gũtũũra tene na tene, naguo wathani waku ũtũũraga nginya njiarwa ciothe. Jehova nĩ mwĩhokeku harĩ ciĩranĩro ciake ciothe, na nĩendete kĩrĩa gĩothe ombĩte.
English: Your kingdom is an everlasting kingdom. Your dominion endures throughout all generations. Yahweh is faithful in all his words, and loving in all his deeds.‡

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩanyiitagĩrĩra arĩa othe maragũa, na agatiira arĩa othe mainamĩte.
English: Yahweh upholds all who fall, and raises up all those who are bowed down.

Kikuyu: Maitho ma andũ othe nĩwe macũthĩrĩirie, na nĩũmaheaga irio ciao hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire.
English: The eyes of all wait for you. You give them their food in due season.

Kikuyu: Ũkũnjũraga guoko gwaku, na ũkahingĩria kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩ muoyo mabataro makĩo.
English: You open your hand, and satisfy the desire of every living thing.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩ mũthingu njĩra-inĩ ciake ciothe, na nĩendete kĩrĩa gĩothe ombĩte.
English: Yahweh is righteous in all his ways, and gracious in all his works.

Kikuyu: Jehova arĩ hakuhĩ na andũ arĩa othe mamũkayagĩra, arĩa othe mamũkayagĩra na ma.
English: Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.

Kikuyu: Arĩa othe mamwĩtigagĩra nĩamahingagĩria mabataro mao; nĩaiguaga kĩrĩro kĩao na akamahonokia.
English: He will fulfill the desire of those who fear him. He also will hear their cry, and will save them.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩamenyagĩrĩra arĩa othe mamwendete, no arĩa othe aaganu nĩkũniina akaamaniina.
English: Yahweh preserves all those who love him, but he will destroy all the wicked.

Kikuyu: Kanua gakwa karĩaragia gakagooca Jehova. Kĩũmbe o gĩothe nĩgĩkĩgooce rĩĩtwa rĩake itheru nginya tene na tene.
English: My mouth will speak the praise of Yahweh. Let all flesh bless his holy name forever and ever.

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova. Wee ngoro yakwa-rĩ, gooca Jehova.
English: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh, my soul.

Kikuyu: Ndĩgoocaga Jehova hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe ngũtũũra muoyo; ndĩrĩinaga, ngoocage Ngai wakwa rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũtũũra muoyo.
English: While I live, I will praise Yahweh. I will sing praises to my God as long as I exist.

Kikuyu: Ndũkanaige mwĩhoko waku harĩ anene, kana harĩ andũ, arĩa matangĩhota kũhonokania.
English: Don’t put your trust in princes, in a son of man in whom there is no help.

Kikuyu: Rĩrĩa roho wao wameherera, macookaga o tĩĩri-inĩ; mũthenya o ro ũcio mĩbango yao ĩtuĩkaga ya tũhũ.
English: His spirit departs, and he returns to the earth. In that very day, his thoughts perish.

Kikuyu: Kũrathimwo-rĩ, nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũteithio wake uumaga kũrĩ Mũrungu wa Jakubu, ũrĩa mwĩhoko wake ũrĩ harĩ Jehova Ngai wake,
English: Happy is he who has the God of Jacob for his help, whose hope is in Yahweh, his God,

Kikuyu: Mũũmbi wa igũrũ na thĩ, na iria, na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtũũraga thĩinĩ wacio: ũcio nĩwe Jehova, ũrĩa ũtũũraga arĩ mwĩhokeku nginya tene.
English: who made heaven and earth, the sea, and all that is in them; who keeps truth forever;

Kikuyu: Nĩarũgamagĩrĩra kĩhooto kĩa arĩa ahatĩrĩrie, na akahe arĩa ahũtu irio. Jehova nĩwe wohoraga arĩa mohetwo,
English: who executes justice for the oppressed; who gives food to the hungry. Yahweh frees the prisoners.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩahingũraga maitho ma arĩa atumumu, Jehova nĩatiiraga arĩa mainamĩte, Jehova nĩendete andũ arĩa athingu.
English: Yahweh opens the eyes of the blind. Yahweh raises up those who are bowed down. Yahweh loves the righteous.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩamenyagĩrĩra andũ a kũngĩ, na agatũũria ciana cia ngoriai o na mũtumia wa ndigwa, no njĩra cia andũ arĩa aaganu nĩacirigiicaga.
English: Yahweh preserves the foreigners. He upholds the fatherless and widow, but he turns the way of the wicked upside down.

Kikuyu: Jehova egũtũũra athamakaga nginya tene, Ngai waku, wee Zayuni, athamakage njiarwa na njiarwa. Goocai Jehova.
English: Yahweh will reign forever; your God, O Zion, to all generations. Praise Yah!

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova. Kaĩ nĩ ũndũ mwega kũgooca Ngai witũ na rwĩmbo-ĩ, kaĩ nĩ ũndũ mwega na mwagĩrĩru kũmũgooca-ĩ!
English: Praise Yah, for it is good to sing praises to our God; for it is pleasant and fitting to praise him.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe wakaga Jerusalemu; nĩwe ũcookagĩrĩria andũ a Isiraeli arĩa matahĩtwo.
English: Yahweh builds up Jerusalem. He gathers together the outcasts of Israel.

Kikuyu: Nĩwe ũhonagia arĩa athuthĩku ngoro, na akamooha ironda ciao.
English: He heals the broken in heart, and binds up their wounds.

Kikuyu: Nĩwe ũmenyaga mũigana wa njata, na akahe njata o njata rĩĩtwa rĩayo.
English: He counts the number of the stars. He calls them all by their names.

Kikuyu: Mwathani witũ nĩwe mũnene na nĩ arĩ hinya mũingĩ; ũmenyo wake ndũrĩ mũthia.
English: Great is our Lord, and mighty in power. His understanding is infinite.

Kikuyu: Jehova nĩwe ũtiiragĩrĩra andũ arĩa ahooreri, no arĩa aaganu amatungumanagia thĩ.
English: Yahweh upholds the humble. He brings the wicked down to the ground.

Kikuyu: Inĩrai Jehova mũmũcookerie ngaatho; inĩrai Ngai witũ na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto.
English: Sing to Yahweh with thanksgiving. Sing praises on the harp to our God,

Kikuyu: Nĩahumbagĩra igũrũ na matu; nĩwe uuragĩria thĩ mbura, na agatũma nyeki ĩmere tũrĩma-inĩ.
English: who covers the sky with clouds, who prepares rain for the earth, who makes grass grow on the mountains.

Kikuyu: Nĩwe ũheaga ngʼombe irio, na akahe tũcui twa mahuru irio rĩrĩa twamũkaĩra.
English: He provides food for the livestock, and for the young ravens when they call.

Kikuyu: We ndakenagĩra hinya wa mbarathi, o na kana agakenera magũrũ ma mũndũ;
English: He doesn’t delight in the strength of the horse. He takes no pleasure in the legs of a man.

Kikuyu: Jehova akenagio nĩ andũ arĩa mamwĩtigagĩra, o arĩa maigaga mwĩhoko wao harĩ wendo wake ũrĩa ũtathiraga.
English: Yahweh takes pleasure in those who fear him, in those who hope in his loving kindness.

Kikuyu: Wee Jerusalemu, kumia Jehova; gooca Ngai waku, wee Zayuni,
English: Praise Yahweh, Jerusalem! Praise your God, Zion!

Kikuyu: nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wĩkagĩra mĩgĩĩko ya ihingo ciaku hinya, na akarathima andũ aku arĩa marĩ thĩinĩ waku.
English: For he has strengthened the bars of your gates. He has blessed your children within you.

Kikuyu: Nĩatũmĩte kũgĩe thayũ mĩhaka-inĩ yaku, na agakũhũũnia na ngano ĩrĩa njega mũno.
English: He makes peace in your borders. He fills you with the finest of the wheat.

Kikuyu: Atũmaga wathani wake ũkinye gũkũ thĩ; kiugo gĩake kĩhanyũkaga narua mũno.
English: He sends out his commandment to the earth. His word runs very swiftly.

Kikuyu: Oiragia tharunji ĩhaana ta guoya mwerũ cua, nayo mbaa akamĩhurunja ta mũhu.
English: He gives snow like wool, and scatters frost like ashes.

Kikuyu: Mbura ya mbembe amiuragia taarĩ kagoto karoira. Nũũ ũngĩhota gwĩtiiria heho ĩyo yake?
English: He hurls down his hail like pebbles. Who can stand before his cold?

Kikuyu: Atũmaga kiugo gĩake agatũma itwekũke; ahurutithanagia rũhuho, namo maaĩ magatherera.
English: He sends out his word, and melts them. He causes his wind to blow, and the waters flow.

Kikuyu: Nĩaguũrĩtie kiugo gĩake harĩ Jakubu, akaguũrĩria Isiraeli mawatho make na kĩrĩra kĩa watho wake wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo.
English: He shows his word to Jacob, his statutes and his ordinances to Israel.

Kikuyu: Ndarĩ ekĩra rũrĩrĩ rũngĩ ta ũguo, mawatho macio make ndũrĩrĩ itirĩ ciamamenya. Goocai Jehova.
English: He has not done this for just any nation. They don’t know his ordinances. Praise Yah!

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova. Goocai Jehova mũrĩ kũu igũrũ, mũmũgooce mũrĩ kũu gũtũũgĩru mũno.
English: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh from the heavens! Praise him in the heights!

Kikuyu: Mũgoocei, inyuĩ araika ake othe, mũmũgooce, inyuothe mbũtũ ciake cia igũrũ.
English: Praise him, all his angels! Praise him, all his army!

Kikuyu: Mũgoocei, inyuĩ riũa na mweri, mũgoocei, inyuothe njata iria icangararaga.
English: Praise him, sun and moon! Praise him, all you shining stars!

Kikuyu: Mũgoocei, inyuĩ igũrũ rĩa igũrũ, o na inyuĩ maaĩ ma kũu igũrũ wa matu.
English: Praise him, you heavens of heavens, you waters that are above the heavens.

Kikuyu: Indo ciothe nĩikĩgooce rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova, nĩgũkorwo nĩwe wathanire na cio ikĩgĩa kuo.
English: Let them praise Yahweh’s name, for he commanded, and they were created.

Kikuyu: Aaciigire handũ hacio itũũre ho tene na tene; aaheanire kĩrĩra kĩa watho wa kũrũmĩrĩrwo kĩrĩa gĩtagathira.
English: He has also established them forever and ever. He has made a decree which will not pass away.

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova gũkũ thĩ, inyuĩ ciũmbe cia iria-inĩ, na ũriku wothe wa maria marĩa manene,
English: Praise Yahweh from the earth, you great sea creatures, and all depths,

Kikuyu: rũheni, na mbura ya mbembe, na tharunji, na matu, na ihuhũkanio cia huho iria ihingagia kĩrĩra gĩake,
English: lightning and hail, snow and clouds, stormy wind, fulfilling his word,

Kikuyu: inyuĩ irĩma, na tũrĩma tuothe, na mĩtĩ ya matunda, na mĩtarakwa yothe,
English: mountains and all hills, fruit trees and all cedars,

Kikuyu: nyamũ cia gĩthaka, na ngʼombe ciothe, na ciũmbe iria nini, o na nyoni iria ciũmbũkaga,
English: wild animals and all livestock, small creatures and flying birds,

Kikuyu: athamaki a thĩ, na ndũrĩrĩ ciothe, na inyuĩ anene, na aathani othe a thĩ,
English: kings of the earth and all peoples, princes and all judges of the earth,

Kikuyu: aanake, na airĩtu, na andũ arĩa akũrũ, o na ciana.
English: both young men and maidens, old men and children.

Kikuyu: Othe nĩmagoocage rĩĩtwa rĩa Jehova, nĩgũkorwo rĩĩtwa rĩake riiki nĩrĩo rĩtũũgĩrie; riiri wake ũrĩ igũrũ rĩa thĩ o na rĩa matu.
English: Let them praise Yahweh’s name, for his name alone is exalted. His glory is above the earth and the heavens.

Kikuyu: Nĩambararĩtie rũhĩa nĩ ũndũ wa andũ ake, nĩruo ũgooci wa andũ ake arĩa aamũre, nĩo andũ a Isiraeli, andũ arĩa marĩ hakuhĩ na ngoro yake. Goocai Jehova.
English: He has lifted up the horn of his people, the praise of all his saints, even of the children of Israel, a people near to him. Praise Yah!

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova. Inĩrai Jehova rwĩmbo rwerũ, mũmũgooce mũrĩ kĩũngano-inĩ kĩa arĩa aamũre.
English: Praise Yahweh! Sing to Yahweh a new song, his praise in the assembly of the saints.

Kikuyu: Andũ a Isiraeli nĩmakenere ũcio wamombire; andũ a Zayuni nĩmacanjamũke nĩ ũndũ wa Mũthamaki wao.
English: Let Israel rejoice in him who made them. Let the children of Zion be joyful in their King.

Kikuyu: Nĩmagooce rĩĩtwa rĩake makĩrũgarũgaga, na mamũinĩre na tũhembe, na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto.
English: Let them praise his name in the dance! Let them sing praises to him with tambourine and harp!

Kikuyu: Nĩgũkorwo Jehova nĩakenagio nĩ andũ ake; andũ arĩa ahooreri amahumbaga thũmbĩ ya ũhonokio.
English: For Yahweh takes pleasure in his people. He crowns the humble with salvation.

Kikuyu: Andũ arĩa aamũre nĩmakenere gĩtĩĩo kĩu, na maine macanjamũkĩte marĩ o marĩrĩ-inĩ mao.
English: Let the saints rejoice in honor. Let them sing for joy on their beds.

Kikuyu: Ũgooci wa Mũrungu ũrokorwo tũnua-inĩ twao, na rũhiũ rwa njora rũnoore mĩena yeerĩ rũkorwo moko-inĩ mao,
English: May the high praises of God be in their mouths, and a two-edged sword in their hand,

Kikuyu: nĩguo meerĩhĩrie harĩ ndũrĩrĩ, na maherithie kĩrĩndĩ gĩa thĩ,
English: to execute vengeance on the nations, and punishments on the peoples;

Kikuyu: nĩguo moohe athamaki ao na mĩnyororo, na moohe andũ ao arĩa marĩ igweta na bĩngũ cia kĩgera,
English: to bind their kings with chains, and their nobles with fetters of iron;

Kikuyu: nĩguo mamakinyĩrie ituĩro rĩrĩa mandĩkĩirwo. Ũcio nĩguo riiri wa andũ ake othe arĩa aamũre. Goocai Jehova.
English: to execute on them the written judgment. All his saints have this honor. Praise Yah!

Kikuyu: Goocai Jehova. Goocai Mũrungu mũrĩ harĩa hake haamũre; mũgoocei mũrĩ kũu igũrũ, o kũu kwa hinya wake.
English: Praise Yah! Praise God in his sanctuary! Praise him in his heavens for his acts of power!

Kikuyu: Mũgoocei nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciake cia hinya; mũgoocei nĩ ũndũ wa ũnene wake mũingĩ mũno.
English: Praise him for his mighty acts! Praise him according to his excellent greatness!

Kikuyu: Mũgoocei mũkĩhuhaga karumbeta, mũmũgooce na kĩnanda kĩa mũgeeto, na gĩa kĩnũbi,
English: Praise him with the sounding of the trumpet! Praise him with harp and lyre!

Kikuyu: mũgoocei na tũhembe mũkĩrũgarũgaga, mũmũgooce na inanda cia nga mũkĩhuhaga mĩtũrirũ,
English: Praise him with tambourine and dancing! Praise him with stringed instruments and flute!

Kikuyu: mũgoocei mũkĩhũũrithanagia thaani cia rũthuku iria ngʼambi, mũmũgooce na thaani ikũgamba o ta rũgambi.
English: Praise him with loud cymbals! Praise him with resounding cymbals!

Kikuyu: Kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩ mĩhũmũ nĩkĩgooce Jehova. Goocai Jehova.
English: Let everything that has breath praise Yah! Praise Yah!
